properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v4 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Spinning out of control, I feel it Losing my defenses No, it’s not easy letting go and trusting You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And if I’m being honest, I know You Though You’ve said You’ve got it No, it’s not easy letting go and trusting You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So I will stop and breathe Rest here in Your goodness I know You won't leave It’s my confidence (Oh, it’s my confidence)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Here I am in the palm of Your hand Nothing can take me away Nothing can take me away Here I am in the palm of Your hand Nothing can take me away Nothing can take me away

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Spinning out of control, I feel it Losing my defenses No, it’s not easy letting go and trusting You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And if I’m being honest, I know You Though You’ve said You’ve got it No, it’s not easy letting go and trusting You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: (So I will) So I will stop and breathe Rest here in Your goodness I know You won't leave It’s my confidence (Oh, it’s my confidence)

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh, it's my confidence (Oh, it's my confidence) Oh, it's my confidence (It's my confidence) Here I am, here I am in the palm of Your hand (It's my confidence) Here I am, God (Learning to trust You)

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: There's not a height, or a depth Or a lie inside my head There's not a fear or offense Nothing can take me away (Nothing can take me away) There's not a height, or a depth Not a lie inside my head Not a fear or offense Nothing can take me away

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Nothing can take me away (Nothing can take me away) Nothing can take me away (Nothing can take me away)
